query:
SELECT
            model_id,
            model_version,
            COUNT(*) AS "count!",
            (vector_dims((SELECT vector FROM embeddings e2
                          WHERE e2.model_id = e.model_id
                            AND e2.model_version = e.model_version
                          LIMIT 1))) AS "dimensions!"
        FROM embeddings e
        GROUP BY model_id, model_version
        ORDER BY model_id, model_version
